heroImage: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/f4/2022_Aston_Martin_Valkyrie_AMR_Pro_in_Xenon_Grey%2C_front_left.jpg/1920px-2022 Aston Martin Valkyrie AMR Pro in Xenon Grey, front left.jpg
description: The Aston Martin Valkyrie, delivered from 2021, is a hypercar developed in partnership with Red Bull Racing. Its Cosworth-built naturally aspirated 6.5-litre V12 combined with a hybrid system produces 1,155 bhp. Limited to 150 road cars, it was designed by Adrian Newey to bring Formula 1 aerodynamic technology to a road car.
